title: hedychium viridibracteatum
intro: Hedychium viridibracteatum, also known as the green-bracted ginger or green ginger lily, is a type of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). This plant is native to the Himalayas and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedychium viridibracteatum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes of Hedychium viridibracteatum are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
